title: Example
content: Hello!

title: Privacy & Legal Updates
content: Updated Joinly's Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
These updates improve transparency regarding:

Data collection practices
Information storage
User responsibilities
Service availability
Please review the updated documents before continuing to use Joinly.

title: Website Launch
content: The official Joinly website is now available.
The new website provides easier access to:

Documentation
Variables reference
Privacy Policy
Terms of Service
Support resources

title: Welcome & Goodbye Improvements
content: Joinly's welcome and goodbye systems have been improved.
Changes include:

Improved embed handling
Better reliability when sending customized embeds.

More customization options
Additional controls for server administrators.

Improved message delivery
Reduced issues with failed welcome and goodbye messages.

title: Configuration System Improvements
content: The Joinly configuration system has been optimized.
Updates include:

Faster configuration loading
Improved setting validation
More reliable saving systems
Better error handling

title: Premium Variables Added
content: Joinly Premium servers now have access to additional variables for advanced message customization.
Added Premium Variables:

User Information
Additional user-related placeholders for personalized messages.

Server Information
More detailed server placeholders for advanced embeds.

Advanced Formatting
Additional formatting options for custom messages.

title: Joinly Community Launch
content: The Joinly community has officially launched.
Users can now access:

Support resources
Documentation
Feature announcements
Development updates

title: Joinly v1.0.0 Released
content: Joinly has received a major update introducing improved configuration systems, better reliability, and new tools for server administrators.
New Features:

Updated Dashboard Experience
A redesigned configuration experience makes managing Joinly settings easier.

Improved Backup System
Server configurations can now be backed up and restored more reliably.

Expanded Variable Support
More placeholders are now available for welcome and goodbye messages.

Performance Improvements
Improved internal systems provide faster responses and increased reliability.
